name: OnIpGetHostByName
title: OnIpGetHostByName
syntax: void OnIpGetHostByName(long result, char hostname[], dword ipv4Address[], dword count); // from 1
void OnIpGetHostByName(long result, char hostname[], byte ipv6Address[][], dword count); // from 2
description: The callback is called if a previous call of IpGetHostByName is returned with error code WSAEWOULDBLOCK (10035) and the dissolve of the address is completed.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: The result of the function. See the Winsock 2 Error Codes for possible errors. Typical values are: result: 0: The function completed successfully. WSAHOST_NOT_FOUND (11001): Host not found.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname which was resolved by the function.

parameters.name: ipv4Address
parameters.description: Array in which the determined IPv4 addresses are written.

parameters.name: ipv6Address
parameters.description: Array in which the determined IPv6 addresses are written.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
